symbols: mounted warrior with spear — the Christian soldier empowered by faith to defeat evil
rearing horse — the dynamic energy of righteous combat
dragon underfoot — Satan and the forces of evil defeated
spear piercing downward — the decisive blow against the ancient serpent
description: A stone or bronze equestrian sculpture photographed against a grey sky, positioned on top of a building or pedestal. A mounted warrior in flowing garments and helmet rides a rearing horse while thrusting a long spear downward into a dragon-like creature beneath the horse's hooves. The dragon has wings and a long serpentine tail. The composition is highly dynamic with strong diagonal movement. The sculpture has a greenish patina suggesting weathered bronze or copper.

scripture_refs.reason: The war in heaven against the dragon — George as a typological figure of the warrior against Satan
The seed of the woman crushing the serpent's head — the spear piercing the dragon
